login_page.notes: Login form. Captcha appears AFTER typing in username field.

captcha.notes: Returns captcha image. Random float parameter.

authenticate.notes: Submit username + password + captcha. Returns session cookies.

user_status.notes: Check if user is logged in.

keepalive.notes: Keep session alive. Call periodically to prevent timeout.

returns_quicklinks.notes: Returns quick links page. Use this to navigate to returns subdomain (handles session handoff).

returns_dashboard.notes: Returns dashboard. MUST navigate via portal links (not direct URL) for session handoff.

rolestatus.notes: Returns filing status of all return types for a given period. rtn_prd format: MMYYYY (e.g., 022026 for Feb 2026).

gstr1.notes: GSTR-1 has BOTH direct instant APIs (like GSTR-3B) AND offline download (async generate). The direct APIs return ALL data instantly — summary, invoices per section, line-item detail, HSN, doc issue. Offline download gives a single JSON file. RECOMMENDED: Use direct APIs for structured access, offline download only if you need the raw file.

notes.B2CS_B2CSA: CONSOLIDATED — B2CS/B2CSA do NOT work with the invoice API. Returns 'No pending invoices found'. B2CS is aggregated by rate/POS, NOT invoice-level. Use summary API for B2CS data.
notes.total_sections: 46 sections in summary API, 27 in totalsummarycount API
notes.verified_with: Nine Packaging (07AAGCN6684E1Z7) Feb 2026 — 511 B2B, 5 CDNR, 5 EXP, 1 B2CL, 4 B2CS, 47 HSN, 3 DOC

form_details.notes: Return metadata: gstin, fy, period, status (FIL=filed), ARN, filing date, due date, auth signer, sumGenStatus (P=generated).

user_details.notes: User/taxpayer info: regName, userType (NT=normal taxpayer), apprv_dt.

total_summary_count.notes: Section-wise record counts (27 sections). Returns: sec_count[{sec_name, err_cnt, pen_cnt, proc_cnt}]. Good for quick overview of what has data.

total_summary_count_section.notes: Per-section recipient breakdown with counterparty details.
total_summary_count_section.response_structure: {gstin, ret_period, sec_count: [{sec_name, cpty_cnts: [{ctin, err_cnt, proc_cnt, pen_cnt, trade_name, txp_typ}]}]}

summary.notes: THE KEY API — complete filed GSTR-1 summary. 46 sections with totals (ttl_rec, ttl_val, ttl_tax, ttl_igst, ttl_cgst, ttl_sgst, ttl_cess, chksum per section). Instant response. No generation needed.
summary.response_structure: {gstin, ret_period, chksum, isCptyLimitExceeded, newSumFlag, sec_sum: [{sec_nm, chksum, ttl_rec, ttl_tax, ttl_igst, ttl_sgst, ttl_cgst, ttl_val, ttl_cess}]}

invoice_all.notes: ALL invoices for a section. Wrapped in {status:1, data:{processedInvoice:[...]}}. Works for B2B, CDNR, EXP, B2CL, CDNUR, AT, TXPD, HSN, DOC, NIL. Does NOT work for B2CS/B2CSA (consolidated, not invoice-level). Returns all 511 B2B invoices in one call — no pagination even at high volume.

response_structure.B2B: {processedInvoice: [{inum, idt, val, invtxval, inviamt, invcamt, invsamt, invcsamt, ctin, flag}]}
response_structure.CDNR: {processedInvoice: [{val, ntty(C/D), nt_num, nt_dt, d_flag, invtxval, inviamt, invcamt, invsamt, invcsamt, ctin, flag}]}
response_structure.EXP: {processedInvoice: [{inum, idt, val, sbnum, sbdt, invtxval, inviamt, invcamt, invsamt, invcsamt, exp_typ(WOPAY/WPAY)}]}
response_structure.B2CL: {processedInvoice: [{inum, idt, val, pos, invtxval, inviamt, invcamt, invsamt, invcsamt}]}
response_structure.HSN: {processedInvoice: {'0': {hsn_b2b:[{rt,txval,iamt,camt,samt,csamt,num,hsn_sc,desc,uqc,qty}], hsn_b2c:[same keys]}}} — NOTE: nested under key '0', not an array. Sample: {rt:18, txval:18518.75, iamt:3333.37, camt:0, samt:0, csamt:0, num:1, hsn_sc:'39211900', desc:'OF OTHER PLASTICS', uqc:'NOS', qty:28875}
response_structure.DOC: {processedInvoice: [{doc_num, docs:[{num, from, to, totnum, cancel, net_issue}]}]}
response_structure.note: B2B list does NOT include e-Invoice fields (irn, srctyp, einvstatus). Only individual invoice detail API or geteinvdata include these.

invoice_by_recipient.notes: Invoices filtered by recipient GSTIN. Same response structure as invoice_all.

invoice_detail.notes: Full invoice detail with line items. inum param is URL-encoded invoice number with _YYYY suffix (e.g. LRS%2FD%2F2526%2F02%2F12_2025). Returns b2b[].inv[] with itms[] array.
invoice_detail.response_structure: {b2b: [{ctin, inv: [{inum, idt, val, pos, rchrg, inv_typ, updby, cflag, flag, chksum, irn, irngendate, srctyp, itms: [{num, itm_det: {rt, txval, iamt, camt, samt, csamt}}]}]}]}
invoice_detail.itms_notes: itms[] contains ALL rate slabs (0%, 0.1%, 0.25%...40%) but only items with actual data have txval/iamt/camt/samt/csamt. Filter by Object.keys(itm_det).length > 1 to find items with data.

summary_generate.notes: Trigger GSTR-1 summary generation/refresh. Usually already generated (check formdetails.sumGenStatus=P).

validate.notes: Check if save is valid for this return.

generate_json.notes: Trigger JSON file generation for offline download. Async process. flag=0 for JSON.

download_file.notes: Download the generated JSON file. file_num is a VERSION number (not file splitting) — increments each time Generate is clicked. Always start with file_num=1 for the latest.

einvoice_apis.notes: E-Invoice APIs are on return.gst.gov.in/einvoice/auth/api/ path. Available from GSTR-1 page. CRITICAL: geteinvdata has DUAL BEHAVIOR based on invoice volume. Low-volume accounts (~30 invoices) get instant JSON; high-volume accounts (~500+ invoices) trigger async file generation. The regular GSTR-1 invoice list API does NOT include e-Invoice fields (irn, einvstatus, srctyp) — only geteinvdata or individual invoice detail API have these.

geteinvdata.notes: THE KEY E-INVOICE API — but has DUAL BEHAVIOR. Low-volume: returns instant JSON with all e-Invoice data. High-volume: triggers async generation, returns {status:1, data:'{msg:..., token:...}'}. Subsequent calls return {status:0, error:{errorCode:'RTN_24', message:'File generation is still in progress'}}. After ~20 min, file appears in geteinvdetl download history.

behavior.low_volume_instant: Returns {status:1, data:'<JSON with b2b,cdnr,cdnur,exp,hsn>'} — tested with ~32 invoices (L.R. Sharma)
behavior.high_volume_async: Returns {status:1, data:'{msg:"Excel download is in progress...", token:"<hex>"}'} — tested with ~511 invoices (Nine Packaging). Then check geteinvdetl for ready file.

response_structure.b2b: {ctin, trdname, inv: [{chksum, inum, idt, val, pos, rchrg, itms, inv_typ, irn, irngendate, einvstatus, autodft, autodftdt, srctyp}]}
response_structure.hsn: {hsn_b2b: [{rt, txval, iamt, camt, samt, csamt, num, hsn_sc, chksum, desc, uqc, qty}], hsn_b2c: []}

geteinvdata.important_note: The regular GSTR-1 invoice?inv=PROCESSED API returns invoices but WITHOUT e-Invoice fields (no irn, srctyp, einvstatus, irngendate). Only geteinvdata or individual invoice detail (invoice?ctin=&inum=) include these fields.

geteinvexcel.notes: E-Invoice data as Excel file download. Returns binary Excel file. HTTP 200.

geteinvdetl.notes: E-Invoice download history. Returns previously generated files for download. If no files generated: {status:0, error: {errorCode:'RETWEB_00', message:'No files available for download'}}. Used by 'E-INVOICE DOWNLOAD HISTORY' button.

autoPopHsn.notes: Import/auto-populate HSN summary from e-Invoice data into GSTR-1 Table 12. WRITE ACTION — overrides existing HSN data. UI shows confirmation dialog before calling. Only works on non-filed returns (button disabled when return is filed). After success, page refreshes HSN data via invoice?sec_name=HSN. Also triggers getReturnStatus check.

params.sec: Section — B2B verified. B2C may also be supported.

autoPopHsn.ui_flow: Click 'Import HSN Data from e-Invoices' → Warning dialog ('This action will completely override...') → Click 'Override' → POST autoPopHsn → GET invoice?sec_name=HSN → GET getReturnStatus
autoPopHsn.verified_with: Nine Packaging (07AAGCN6684E1Z7) Apr 2026 — imported 23 B2B HSN records from e-Invoices

getHsnExcel.notes: Download HSN summary from e-Invoices as Excel file. Returns binary Excel. HTTP 200. Works on both filed and non-filed returns. Triggered by 'DOWNLOAD HSN SUMMARY FROM E-INVOICES' button on HSN page.

ewb_apis.notes: E-Way Bill (EWB) import APIs. Available from GSTR-1 B2B section ('IMPORT EWB DATA' button). Allows importing e-Way Bill data into B2B invoices. Uses return.gst.gov.in domain.

checkewbdetl.notes: Check if EWB data is available for import. Returns {ewbCount: N}. If ewbCount=0, shows 'no EWB invoices available to import' message.

ewbdetl.notes: Get actual EWB data as structured JSON. ALWAYS INSTANT — returns all e-Way Bill invoices regardless of volume. Tested with 106 invoices across 30 recipients (Nine Packaging Feb 2026). NOTE: uses 'rcname' (not 'trdname') for recipient name.

response_structure.invoice: {inum, idt, val, pos, rchrg, inv_typ, itms: [...]}

ewbdetl.verified_with: Nine Packaging (07AAGCN6684E1Z7) — 106 invoices, 30 recipients for Feb 2026; 94 invoices for Mar 2026

ewbgenerate.notes: Trigger async EWB file generation for offline download. Returns token. Same async pattern as GSTR-1/2A offline download.
ewbgenerate.response_structure: {status:1, data: {status:1, msg:'Your request for generation has been accepted kindly wait for 20 min', token:'<hex>'}}

ewb_page.notes: EWB offline download page. Navigated to from B2B section when ewbCount > 0. Uses Ewbctrl controller.

buttons.download_hsn_einvoice: Triggers getHsnExcel API — downloads Excel with HSN from e-Invoices
buttons.import_hsn_einvoice: Triggers autoPopHsn POST — imports/overrides HSN data from e-Invoices into Table 12. DISABLED when return is filed.

supporting_apis.checkAatoGt5Cr: GET /returns/auth/api/common/checkAatoGt5Cr?rtn_prd={MMYYYY} — checks if aggregate turnover > 5 Cr (affects HSN reporting requirements)
supporting_apis.products: GET /usrmstrweb/auth/usermaster/products — user's saved product master list
supporting_apis.getReturnStatus: GET /returns/auth/api/common/getReturnStatus?ref_id={REF_ID}&rtn_prd={MMYYYY}&rtn_typ=GSTR1 — check status after save/import action

recommended_fetch_strategy: 1. Call formdetails to get status, ARN, filing date
2. Call summary for complete 46-section totals (17KB instant)
3. Call totalsummarycount to see which sections have data
4. For sections with data, call invoice?inv=ALL&sec_name={SECTION} to get all invoices
5. For detailed line items, call invoice with ctin+inum params
6. HSN and DOC sections also use the invoice endpoint with sec_name=HSN/DOC
7. Alternative: Use offline download (generate_json → download_file) for a single JSON dump
8. Call geteinvdata for complete e-Invoice data (instant JSON with IRN, einvstatus, autodraft info)
9. Call checkewbdetl to check EWB availability, then ewbdetl for actual EWB data if available

push_apis._comment: === PUSH (POST) APIs — Add/Edit/Delete invoices, Submit, File GSTR-1 ===

filing_flow.step_1_add_invoices: POST invoice/add — Add invoices per section (B2B, CDNR, EXP, etc.). Can add multiple times.
filing_flow.step_2_generate_summary: POST /gstr1/summary/generate — Refresh summary totals after adding invoices.
filing_flow.step_3_submit: POST /gstr1/submit — Submit GSTR-1. LOCKS the return.
filing_flow.step_4_file: POST /returns2/auth/api/gstr/filereturn — Shared filing endpoint (handles EVC + DSC for ALL return types).
filing_flow.notes: GSTR-1 uses the SAME shared filereturn endpoint as GSTR-3B. No separate GSTR-1 EVC generate/validate endpoints — filing is handled by the shared controller in main.js.

section_body_variants.B2B: {gstin, fp, gt, b2b: [{ctin, inv: [{inum, idt, val, pos, rchrg, inv_typ, itms}]}]}
section_body_variants.B2BA: {gstin, fp, gt, b2ba: [{ctin, inv: [{oinum, oidt, inum, idt, val, pos, rchrg, inv_typ, itms}]}]}
section_body_variants.CDNR: {gstin, fp, gt, cdnr: [{ctin, nt: [{ntty, nt_num, nt_dt, val, pos, rchrg, inv_typ, itms}]}]}
section_body_variants.CDNUR: {gstin, fp, gt, cdnur: [{ntty, nt_num, nt_dt, val, pos, itms}]}
section_body_variants.B2CL: {fp, gt, b2cl: [{pos, inv: [{inum, idt, val, itms}]}]}
section_body_variants.B2CS: {fp, gt, b2cs: [{pos, sply_ty, rt, txval, iamt, camt, samt, csamt, typ}]}
section_body_variants.EXP: {gstin, fp, gt, exp: [{exp_typ, inv: [{inum, idt, val, sbpcode, sbnum, sbdt, itms}]}]}
section_body_variants.AT: {fp, gt, at: [{pos, sply_ty, itms: [{rt, ad_amt, iamt, camt, samt, csamt}]}]}
section_body_variants.TXPD: {fp, gt, txpd: [{pos, sply_ty, itms: [{rt, ad_amt, iamt, camt, samt, csamt}]}]}
section_body_variants.HSN: {fp, gt, hsn: [{hsn_sc, desc, uqc, qty, rt, txval, iamt, camt, samt, csamt}]}
section_body_variants.DOC: {fp, gt, doc_issue: [{doc_num, doc_typ, docs: [{num, from, to, totnum, cancel, net_issue}]}]}

field_legend.ctin: Counter-party GSTIN (recipient for B2B, supplier for CDNR)
field_legend.inv_typ: R=Regular, DE=Deemed Export, SEWP=SEZ with payment, SEWOP=SEZ without payment

invoice_add.notes: Add invoices to GSTR-1. Body structure varies by section — top-level array key matches section name. B2B/CDNR group by counter-party GSTIN. B2CS/AT/TXPD are consolidated (no individual invoices). All amounts are in paisa-rounded decimals. 74 POST calls total in the controller for all section variants.

invoice_edit.body: Same structure as invoice/add — full invoice data with updated fields
invoice_edit.notes: Edit existing invoices. Same body format as add.

invoice_accept.notes: Accept e-Invoice auto-drafted invoices into GSTR-1.

save_gross_turnover.notes: Save gross turnover value. Called from summary page. Response: 'Gross Turnover saved successfully'.

submit.notes: Submit GSTR-1. LOCKS the return. flag:'Y' variant may be used for IFF. Uses angular.toJson(gstr1sum).

reset.notes: Reset GSTR-1 data. DESTRUCTIVE — clears all manually added invoices.

file_return.notes: SHARED filing endpoint for ALL return types (GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-1A, etc.). Called via commonfile() in main.js. Response contains uuid in data.map.uuid. NOTE: uses returns2 subdomain, not returns.
file_return.important: The EVC generate/validate for GSTR-1 uses the same shared flow as GSTR-3B. The params passed to this endpoint include the return type and EVC/DSC data.

upload_json.notes: Upload JSON file for bulk invoice import. Called from offline upload page via $scope.uploadfil(). The JSON format matches the offline download format. Also supports: auth/api/gstr1e/upload (for GSTR-1E).

summary_generate.notes: Trigger summary generation/refresh after adding invoices.

move_data.notes: Move/migrate data between periods or sections.

ewb_upload.notes: Upload e-Way Bill data into GSTR-1 B2B invoices.

evc_generate.notes: Generate EVC OTP for GSTR-1A filing.

evc_validate.notes: Validate EVC OTP to complete GSTR-1A filing.

datahash.notes: Get data hash for GSTR-1A DSC signing.

download_file.notes: Download generated JSON. Same pattern as GSTR-1. file_num is a version number, not file splitting.

generate_excel.notes: GSTR-2A also supports Excel download (flag=1 likely for Excel, flag=0 for JSON).

gstr2b.notes: GSTR-2B has its own subdomain. getjson and getdata return IDENTICAL data. View page uses getdata, Download page uses getjson. Excel download on view page is CLIENT-SIDE (no API). All table views (B2B/CDNR/ISD/IMPG/ECO etc.) render from single getdata response. MUST navigate through portal links — direct URL causes Access Denied.

get_json.notes: Full GSTR-2B data instantly. No async generation. IDENTICAL to getdata. rtnprd param (no underscore). Used by Download page.

get_data.notes: IDENTICAL to getjson — confirmed byte-for-byte on Nine Packaging Feb 2026. Used by View/Summary page. Either API can be used.

get_user_dtls.notes: Returns metadata: gstin, fy, rtnprd, lgnm (legal name), trdnm (trade name). Generation date also returned.

docdata.description: Invoice-level document data. Only populated types appear.
docdata.b2b_structure: {ctin, trdnm, supfildt, supprd, inv: [{inum, dt, val, txval, igst, cgst, sgst, cess, rev, itcavl, typ, imsStatus, pos, rsn}]}
docdata.cdnr_structure: {ctin, trdnm, supfildt, supprd, nt: [{ntnum, dt, val, txval, igst, cgst, sgst, cess, typ(C/D), rev, itcavl, imsStatus, pos, rsn, irn, irngendate, srctyp, suptyp, itcRedReq}]}
docdata.cdnr_note: CDNR notes can include e-Invoice fields (irn, irngendate, srctyp='E-Invoice') and IMS fields (imsStatus, itcRedReq, suptyp)
docdata.b2ba_structure: {ctin, trdnm, supfildt, supprd, inv: [{...same as b2b + oinum (original invoice number for amendment)}]}

cpsumm.description: Counterparty-level aggregated summary (same section keys as docdata but aggregated per supplier).
cpsumm.b2b_structure: {ctin, trdnm, txval, igst, cgst, sgst, cess, ttldocs, supfildt, supprd}
cpsumm.cdnr_structure: {ctin, trdnm, txval, igst, cgst, sgst, cess, ttldocs, supfildt, supprd, nttyp}

itcsumm.description: ITC summary broken by supply type.
itcsumm.structure: {itcavl: {nonrevsup: {b2b, b2ba, sgst, cgst, igst, cess}, revsup: {b2b, txval, sgst, cgst, igst, cess}, othersup: {cdnr, sgst, cgst, igst, cess}}}

gstr3b.notes: GSTR-3B has FULL structured JSON via the summary API — no need for PDF scraping. Complete PUSH (save/submit/file) and PULL (fetch) APIs documented. 32 unique API endpoints total. Filing supports EVC (OTP-based, no DSC needed) or DSC (digital signature). EVC flow: save → submit → offsetliab → evc/generate → evc/validate.

filing_flow.step_1_save: POST /save — Save GSTR-3B summary data (all tables). Can save multiple times before submit.
filing_flow.step_2_saveitc: POST /saveitc — Save ITC/tax payment offset allocation. Optional separate step.
filing_flow.step_3_submit: POST /submit — Submit GSTR-3B. After this, data is LOCKED and cannot be edited.
filing_flow.step_4_offsetliab: POST /offsetliab — Offset tax liability using ITC and cash balance.
filing_flow.step_5a_evc_generate: POST /evc/generate — Generate EVC OTP (sent to registered mobile/email). For filing WITHOUT DSC.
filing_flow.step_5b_evc_validate: POST /evc/validate — Validate the 6-char OTP to complete filing. OTP format: ^[0-9A-Z]{6}$
filing_flow.step_5_alt_dsc: For DSC filing: POST /datahash → sign externally → POST /sign with digital signature.
filing_flow.notes: EVC = Electronic Verification Code. This is the OTP-free path for filing (the OTP here is the EVC code, NOT the login OTP). DSC = Digital Signature Certificate (requires hardware token).

summary.notes: THE KEY API — returns complete GSTR-3B structured JSON. Contains: sup_details (osup_det/osup_zero/osup_nil_exmp/isup_rev/osup_nongst with txval/iamt/camt/samt/csamt), inter_sup (unreg/comp/uin_details), itc_elg (itc_avl by type [IMPG/IMPS/ISRC/ISD/OTH], itc_rev, itc_net, itc_inelg), inward_sup, intr_ltfee, tt_val (tt_pay/tt_csh_pd/tt_itc_pd), qn (questionnaire), liab_breakup, eco_dtls.

sup_details.osup_det: Table 3.1(a) — Outward taxable supplies (txval, iamt, camt, samt, csamt)
sup_details.isup_rev: Table 3.1(d) — Inward supplies liable to reverse charge

itc_elg.itc_avl: Table 4(A) — ITC available (types: IMPG=import goods, IMPS=import services, ISRC=reverse charge, ISD=input service distributor, OTH=all other)

response_structure.tt_val: Table 6 — Payment summary (tt_csh_pd=cash paid, tt_itc_pd=ITC utilized)

form_details.notes: Metadata: gstin, fy, period, status (FIL=filed), ARN, filing date, due date, legal name.

taxpayble.notes: Detailed tax payment data. Only available AFTER save. Returns balances + payment breakdown. Feeds the offset_liability POST body.

getr1r3bliab.notes: System-generated auto-populated values — compares GSTR-1/2B to compute GSTR-3B. Contains statustbl (r1frmst/r2bfrmst/r1sumst/r2bsumst), r1fildt, r2bgendt, r3bgendt, and full liabitc breakdown. Largest response. NOTE: retPeriod param (no underscore).

system_interest.notes: System interest calculation. May return error RT-3BB0014 if previous period not filed or interest not applicable.

get_details.notes: Config/threshold data: autoCalcFlag, upDownValues (variance thresholds per section). NOTE: retPeriod param (no underscore).

negative_liab.notes: Negative liability details. Often empty (flag:false, negativeLiabResp:[]).

is_gstr1_filed.notes: Check if GSTR-1 is filed for the period.

validate.notes: Validate GSTR-3B data before submit. Called to check for errors in the filled data.

get_txn_status.notes: Get transaction/filing status. Used to poll for async operation completion (submit, offset, filing).

check_late_fee_liab.notes: Check late fee liability for the period.

check_locking.notes: Check if GSTR-3B is locked for editing (locked after submit). Called before save/edit operations.

has_offset.notes: Check if offset has already been done for this period.

get_nil_flag.notes: Check if nil filing flag is set for this GSTIN.

get_late_fee_md.notes: Get late fee metadata — configuration for late fee calculation.

liab_breakup_status.notes: Get liability breakup status for display on payment page.

set_off_status_get.notes: GET version — fetch current offset status and ITC availability. Called before offset.

show_pdf.notes: Returns success flag for PDF availability. NOTE: retPeriod param (no underscore).

generate_pdf.notes: Generate/download GSTR-3B PDF. Only needed if PDF format specifically required.

rcm_available.notes: RCM available balance. Actions: 'clsbal' (closing balance, no rtnPrd), 'opnbal' (opening balance, with rtnPrd).

apis._push_apis_comment: === PUSH (POST) APIs — Save, Submit, File GSTR-3B ===

body_field_legend.sup_details.osup_det: Table 3.1(a) Outward taxable supplies (other than zero/nil/exempted)
body_field_legend.sup_details.isup_rev: Table 3.1(d) Inward supplies liable to reverse charge
body_field_legend.itc_avl_types: IMPG=Import of Goods, IMPS=Import of Services, ISRC=Inward supplies (reverse charge), ISD=Input Service Distributor, OTH=All other ITC
body_field_legend.tax_fields: txval=taxable value, iamt=IGST, camt=CGST, samt=SGST, csamt=Cess
body_field_legend.qn_fields: q1-q7=Questionnaire Y/N flags (e.g. q2=made supplies to unregistered, q3=made inter-state supplies)

save.notes: Save GSTR-3B data. Can be called multiple times. Body is the FULL gstr3bSummary JSON — SAME structure as summary GET response. Verified from live Nine Packaging data (Mar 2026). For unfiled periods, itc_elg/qn/liab_breakup may be absent in GET but MUST be included in save POST.

body_field_legend.format: {SOURCE}_{DESTINATION}_amt — amount of {SOURCE} tax paid using {DESTINATION} balance
body_field_legend.igst_igst_amt: IGST liability paid from IGST ITC
body_field_legend.igst_cgst_amt: IGST liability paid from CGST ITC (cross-utilization)
body_field_legend.igst_sgst_amt: IGST liability paid from SGST ITC (cross-utilization)
body_field_legend.cgst_igst_amt: CGST liability paid from IGST ITC (cross-utilization)
body_field_legend.cgst_cgst_amt: CGST liability paid from CGST ITC
body_field_legend.sgst_igst_amt: SGST liability paid from IGST ITC (cross-utilization)
body_field_legend.sgst_sgst_amt: SGST liability paid from SGST ITC

save_itc.notes: Save ITC cross-utilization matrix. This is the payment page data showing how ITC from each head is used to pay liability of each head. Called from paymentctrl. Verified from live pd_by_itc data.

save_breakup.notes: Save liability breakup details. Called with gstin, ret_period, and liability breakdown amounts.

reset.notes: Reset GSTR-3B data to auto-populated values. DESTRUCTIVE — clears all manual edits.

submit.notes: Submit GSTR-3B. LOCKS the return — no further edits possible. Must save before submit. Deletes transId from summary before submitting.

body_template.utilNlsAdjReqVO: {OPTIONAL — negative liability adjustment, omit if zero}
body_template.utilNlsNetReqVO: {OPTIONAL — negative liability net, omit if zero}

body_field_legend.utilCsshReqVO: Main offset request — ITC utilization + cash payment combined
body_field_legend.tran_cd: Transaction code from tax_pay[]. 30002=regular liability, 30003=late fee liability
body_field_legend.cross_util_fields: Same {SOURCE}_{DESTINATION}_amt pattern as saveitc — how ITC is utilized across tax heads
body_field_legend.utilNlsAdjReqVO: Only include if negative liability adjustment needed (nlsadjrtot/nlsadjnrtot > 0)
body_field_legend.utilNlsNetReqVO: Only include if negative liability net needed (nlsnetrtot/nlsnetnrtot > 0)

offset_liability.notes: Offset tax liability against ITC and cash balance. Called after submit. liab_id and tran_cd come from the taxpayble response. Verified from live Feb 2026 data: liab_id=344022363, tran_cd=30002.

set_off_status_post.notes: POST version — update/set offset status after offset is done.

compute_interest.notes: Compute/recompute interest for the period. Called from interestlatefeectrl.

data_hash.notes: Get data hash for DSC signing. Called before sign API. Part of DSC filing flow (alternative to EVC).

sign_dsc.notes: File GSTR-3B with Digital Signature Certificate (DSC). Sign field contains the digital signature response. Alternative to EVC flow.

evc_generate.notes: Generate EVC (Electronic Verification Code) OTP. Sends 6-character code to registered mobile/email. Body is DscAuth object with pan, emailId, mobNo. THIS is the filing OTP — different from login OTP.

evc_validate.notes: Validate EVC OTP to complete filing. OTP must match pattern ^[0-9A-Z]{6}$. On success, GSTR-3B is FILED and ARN is generated.

evc_resend.notes: Resend EVC OTP. Note: uses 'fp' param (not ret_period). Starts 30-second countdown timer. Generic endpoint shared across return types.

param_notes.rtn_prd_vs_retPeriod: Some APIs use 'rtn_prd' (with underscore), others use 'retPeriod' (camelCase). getr1r3bliab, getDetails, showpdf use retPeriod.
param_notes.ret_period_vs_rtn_prd: POST body params use 'ret_period' (with underscore). Query params vary — setOffStatus GET uses ret_period, POST uses rtn_prd.
param_notes.base_url: All API paths are relative to https://return.gst.gov.in

trusted_device_states.description: No captcha, no OTP. Direct login with username + password only.
Captcha required but OTP skipped. Username + password + captcha.

session_notes: Session cookies are httpOnly — cannot read via document.cookie, but Playwright context.cookies() works.
Cross-subdomain navigation MUST go through portal's own links (Services > Returns). Direct URL navigation breaks session.
Session timeout is relatively short. Use keepalive API periodically.
Captcha only appears AFTER typing in the username field, not before.

recommended_flow: 1. User enters GSTIN/username/password in fillgst.com UI
2. Playwright (headless) navigates to login page
3. Fill username → wait for captcha to appear
4. Extract captcha image → relay to fillgst.com UI
5. User solves captcha in fillgst.com UI
6. Playwright submits captcha + clicks Login
7. If trusted device → direct dashboard (no OTP needed!)
8. Capture session cookies via context.cookies()
9. Close browser — all further data fetching via pure HTTP with cookies
10. Call keepalive API periodically to maintain session
11. Fetch GSTR-2B via direct API (instant 149KB JSON — gstr2b subdomain)
12a. Fetch GSTR-1 summary via instant API (17KB — return subdomain)
12b. Fetch GSTR-1 invoices per section via instant API (return subdomain)
12c. OR Fetch GSTR-1 full JSON via offline generate → download pattern
12d. Fetch GSTR-2A via generate → poll → download pattern (return subdomain)
12e. Fetch e-Invoice data via geteinvdata (instant JSON with IRN, einvstatus, autodraft info)
12f. Optionally fetch e-Invoice Excel via geteinvexcel or HSN Excel via getHsnExcel
12g. Check EWB availability via checkewbdetl, fetch ewbdetl if ewbCount > 0
13. Fetch GSTR-3B via summary API (instant structured JSON — NO PDF needed!)
14. Fetch GSTR-3B tax payment details via taxpayble API
15. Fetch GSTR-3B system-generated values via getr1r3bliab API
--- GSTR-3B FILING (PUSH) FLOW ---
16. POST save — Save GSTR-3B data (body: full gstr3bSummary object)
17. POST saveitc — Save ITC/tax payment offset allocation
18. POST submit — Submit GSTR-3B (locks return, body: {gstin, ret_period})
19. POST offsetliab — Offset tax liability against ITC and cash
20a. POST evc/generate — Generate EVC OTP (body: {pan, emailId, mobNo})
20b. POST evc/validate — Validate 6-char OTP to complete filing (body: {ret_period, otp})
20alt. For DSC: POST datahash → sign externally → POST sign with {ret_period, pan, sign, data}

param_gotchas.rtn_prd_vs_rtnprd: GSTR-2B uses 'rtnprd' (no underscore), all others use 'rtn_prd'
param_gotchas.retPeriod_vs_rtn_prd: Some GSTR-3B APIs use 'retPeriod' (getr1r3bliab, getDetails, showpdf), others use 'rtn_prd'

ims.notes: IMS allows taxpayers to Accept/Reject/Pending inward supply invoices before GSTR-2B generation. Records with no action are 'deemed accepted'. Uses FLAT invoice arrays (unlike GSTR-2B which groups by supplier ctin). Three categories: All other ITC, Inward Supplies from ISD, Import of Goods.

navigation.entry_point: Services > Returns > Invoice Management System (IMS) Dashboard
navigation.warning: NEVER navigate directly to /imsweb URLs — use portal menu links for cross-subdomain session handoff

getCount.notes: Returns section-wise accept/reject/pending/noaction counts. Called once per goods_typ when page loads.

goods_typ_values.ALL_OTH: All other ITC — B2B, B2BA, B2BDN, B2BDNA, B2BCN, B2BCNA, ECOM, ECOMA
goods_typ_values.INV_SUPP_ISD: Inward Supplies from ISD — ISD Invoice, ISD Amendments, ISD Credit Notes, ISD Credit Notes Amendments
goods_typ_values.IMP_GDS: Import of Goods — IMPG, IMPG Amendments, IMPGSEZ, IMPGSEZ Amendments

verified_counts_nine_packaging.imp_gds_note: Import of Goods has NO 'Rejected' column — only No Action, Accepted, Pending

getInvoices.notes: Returns FLAT array of inward invoices for a section. Unlike GSTR-2B (grouped by ctin), IMS returns a flat list with stin (supplier GSTIN) per record.

saveAction.notes: Save accept/reject/pending actions on invoices. WRITE ACTION — modifies IMS state. Request body contains invoice array with action field set.

get2BGenStatus.notes: Check GSTR-2B generation status for the current period.

applicableRtnPrds.notes: Returns all available return periods from Oct 2019 onwards.

generate2B.notes: Trigger GSTR-2B generation. WRITE ACTION — initiates 2B computation from IMS data.

resetIms.notes: Reset all IMS actions back to 'No Action'. WRITE ACTION — clears all accept/reject/pending.

generateDoc.notes: Generate/download inward supplies document (Excel). Async pattern: flag=0 triggers generation ('Your request for file generation has been accepted'), then flag=1 downloads the file. Uses createElement+click anchor download pattern. Button: 'DOWNLOAD IMS DETAILS (EXCEL)' on Inward Supplies page.

validateCOUser.notes: Validate if user is a Composition taxpayer (IMS not applicable for composition).

getDropDown.notes: Returns dropdown values for Outward Supplies page — financial years, return periods, return types.

getOutwardCount.notes: Returns section-wise record counts for outward supplies. Two tabs: 'Universal view' and 'Rejected records'.

getOutwardInvoices.notes: Returns FLAT array of outward invoices. Shows recipient actions on your invoices.

generateOutwardsDoc.notes: Generate/download outward supplies document (Excel). Async pattern like generateDoc. Button: 'DOWNLOAD IMS DETAILS (EXCEL)' on Outward Supplies page.

params.section: ALLOSP=all sections, or specific section code

rejectedrecords.notes: Get rejected records (where liability added back in GSTR 3B).

userdetails.notes: Get supplier/recipient trade name and details by GSTIN.

offline_download.notes: Offline download of IMS data. Button: 'OFFLINE' on IMS Dashboard.

sections.heading: IMPG - Import of goods from overseas
IMPGSEZ - Import of goods from SEZ

import_of_goods.note: NO Rejected column — import invoices cannot be rejected

tabs.universal_view: Universal view of B2B supplies reported in GSTR-1/1A/IFF
tabs.rejected_records: Rejected records (where liability added back in GSTR 3B)

outward_supply_structure.note: Return Type not applicable for Rejected records section

ims.info_dialog: Records, where no action is taken by taxpayer, will be considered as Deemed accepted for GSTR 2B generation.
